text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I can't believe I've been defeated once
again...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm such a disgrace! A shame to the title of
Empress!
choice_data_list:
Hold onto that feeling and let it propel you
onward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The only thing I feel right now is regret.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, I refuse to let myself dwell on this
failure.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Forget what I just said. I lost my composure and
spoke too soon.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll hold onto this regret and secure victory!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it is as you say. No matter how much I
complain, the crowd saw my poor performance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My failure will remain forever, no matter how
much I wish otherwise.
choice_data_list:
We'll make them all forget by winning the next
one!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A victory that supersedes this loss? A win
outstanding enough to trivialize this debacle?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm the one acting childish by dragging
along this failure like some kind of ball and chain.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're training as soon as we get back. I won't let
this get me down!
